title: tristachya auronitens
intro: Tristachya auronitens, also known as African cup grass, is a perennial plant native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tristachya auronitens include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, wounds, and respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Tristachya auronitens is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it is also used in traditional remedies to treat various ailments in combination with other plants.
